name: Fantasy House
description:
Synopsis

In a chaotic shared house, four eccentric roommates try to balance friendship, rivalry, and everyday life — with plenty of pizza, gaming marathons, and late-night drama. Emil, the clumsy gamer-philosopher; Mia, his attention-seeking cat-girl sister; Jessy, the sarcastic goth rocker; and Anna, the cheerful elf streamer, fill the house with noise, laughter, and absurd antics. Between hot tub gossip, endless video game competitions, surprise visits from family (and exes), and the occasional food disaster in the kitchen, life here is never quiet — and every night feels like the start of a new adventure.
creator: Miguel 360LEGEND
